text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan tell Yaeno
Muteki about their injuries. It's still uncertain
when—or if—they'll be able to return to the turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're worried that no one will be waiting for
them when they return, so Yaeno Muteki
promises that she'll continue racing to keep their
names in the mind of the public.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoping to remind the audience of the racers she
ran against her two friends, Yaeno Muteki
decides to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the Arima Kinen, the crowd buzzes with
excitement at the prospect of another face-off
between Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Yaeno Muteki is determined to steal all
of their attention with a stunning performance.
